title: Salty Venezuelan Prawns Ceviche
description: A vibrant, salt-forward ceviche featuring fresh king prawns, citrus juices, and a crunchy mix of onions, cucumber, and jalapeno, perfect for a crowd-pleasing Whole30 dinner.
instructions: Clean and devein the king prawns, then rinse under cold water and pat dry.
In a large glass or ceramic bowl, combine the prawns with lime juice, orange juice, sea salt, and black pepper; stir gently to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 15–20 minutes to allow the prawns to “cook” in the acid.
While the prawns marinate, dice the red onion, cucumber, and jalapeño; chop the cilantro.
After marinating, add the diced vegetables and chopped cilantro to the prawns; mix gently to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt if desired.
Let the ceviche rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Plate the ceviche in individual bowls, garnish with sliced avocado and chopped red bell pepper.
Serve chilled, optionally with a side of crisp lettuce or whole30-friendly tortilla chips for scooping.
